keywords_glossary.Link: When this Frame enters play, establish a Link with one allied Frame (share a keyword until either leaves).
keywords_glossary.Shield: The next harm this Frame would take is redirected to the Shield buffer instead.
keywords_glossary.Pulse: At end of turn, apply a small Integrity restore or Signal tick as written on the card.
keywords_glossary.Jammer: Opponents cannot choose this Frame until it acts.
keywords_glossary.Deploy: This Frame may act the turn it enters play.
keywords_glossary.Sync: If another allied Frame with Sync is in play, gain the listed bonus.
keywords_glossary.Overclock: Spend 1 extra mana when playing this Frame to double its enter effect.
keywords_glossary.Static: While Static is active on this Frame, it cannot act until end of turn.
keywords_glossary.Relay: Can influence distant Frames without close engagement.
keywords_glossary.Hardline: Opponents must engage this Frame before others when able.
keywords_glossary.Bootstrap: When this Frame enters play, draw a card or gain 1 Signal.
keywords_glossary.Recalibrate: Restore Integrity to an allied Frame or yourself.
keywords_glossary.Echo: Repeats its lab effect at end of turn.
keywords_glossary.Anchored: This Frame cannot be moved this turn.
keywords_glossary.Signal: This Frame holds the grid — cannot be displaced while Integrity remains.
